params.name: Book of Shadows
params.description:
On Feb 22, 1954 AD, the Wiccan sect was created and the Book of Shadows became its foundational text.
This strange book, which comes from a Wiccan, records many spells, rituals, and blessings of witches and goddesses. It also spreads the idea of diversity and tolerance in Faith. It thereby serves as one of the theological pillars for the sect and has been passed down as a foundational work.
